description:
Undocumented REST API for lalafo.kg — Kyrgyz classifieds marketplace.
Covers ads search, category browsing, and ad detail viewing.
Base URL: https://api.lalafo.com
Required headers on all requests: Device, Language, Country-Id

tools.name: ads_get
tools.description: Retrieve full details for a single ad by ID. Required: id. Returns the Ad.

tools.name: ads_get-count
tools.description: Returns the total number of active ads.

tools.name: ads_list
tools.description: Browse latest ads with optional category and user filters. Returns paginated results. Optional: per-page (default: 20), page (default: 1), category_id (plus 1 more).

tools.name: ads_search
tools.description: Search ads by keyword query with optional category filter. Required: q. Optional: per-page (default: 20), page (default: 1), category_id. Returns array of Ad.

tools.name: categories_get-category-tree
tools.description: Returns the full hierarchical category tree with nested children.

tools.name: countries_list
tools.description: Returns all countries where Lalafo operates.

tools.name: params_get-category
tools.description: Returns available filter parameters (condition, model, year, etc.) for a given category. Required: categoryId.

tools.name: users_get
tools.description: Retrieve a user's public profile by ID. Required: id. Returns the User.
